system_description: Hot fluid-applied rubberized asphalt membrane waterproofing system. Applied at elevated temperature for monolithic seamless waterproofing. Often used with RamFlash PMMA for detail/flashing work.

assembly_validation.notes: Component list derived from product knowledge and definition file. RT-250 has strong DXF evidence (26 files) with the second-cleanest file overall (noise score 4.6852, CLEAN_5 phase). Layer names include multiple aliases (RamTough 250, RT-250, RT250) that need DXF confirmation. Cross-family dependency with PMMA flashing system is documented but not modeled at assembly level.

readiness_blockers: DXF source files are local-only (gitignored) — layer mapping not validated against parsed JSON
Component list derived from product knowledge, not confirmed from DXF geometry evidence
Multiple layer name aliases (RamTough 250, RT-250, RT250) need confirmation from DXF layer inventory
Cross-family dependency with PMMA flashing system not yet modeled at assembly level
Ownership classification needs DXF layer-to-role confirmation pass

cross_family_relationships.description: RT-250 field membrane is commonly paired with PMMA for flashing and detail conditions
